channel.title: Mouad the Coder - Chamber of Chronicles
channel.description: Technical scrolls and medieval musings on web development and cybersecurity.

item.title: Your First Beginner Course to HTML
item.description: Start from scratch and learn the foundation of web development with HTML.

item.title: How to Implement CSS Into Your HTML
item.description: Learn how to style your static website using internal, external, and inline CSS.

item.title: Add JavaScript to Your First Static Website
item.description: Bring interactivity to life by adding scripts to your HTML page.

item.title: Essential HTML Tags You Should Know
item.description: A curated list of must-know HTML elements for every beginner developer.

item.title: Don't Underestimate CSS: Advanced Tricks You Need
item.description: Level up your styling game with powerful CSS techniques like Flexbox, Grid, and custom properties.

item.title: JavaScript DOM Manipulation for Beginners
item.description: Learn how to change HTML content and styles dynamically using JavaScript.

item.title: Understanding Variables, Data Types & Operators in JS
item.description: A deep dive into JavaScript fundamentals: variables, types, and operations.

item.title: How to Debug JavaScript Like a Pro
item.description: Master console.log, breakpoints, and browser dev tools to squash bugs fast.

item.title: Intro to Responsive Web Design with Media Queries
item.description: Make your websites mobile-friendly using CSS media queries and viewport settings.

item.title: From Zero to Deploy: Hosting Your First Website
item.description: Learn how to publish your HTML/CSS/JS site online using free platforms like GitHub Pages and Netlify.

item.title: Logo Programming: Basic Syntax
item.description: Learn the fundamentals of Logo programming and its simple, turtle-based syntax.

item.title: Algorithm: What is an Algorithm and Pseudocode
item.description: Understand what algorithms are and how pseudocode helps you plan solutions before coding.

item.title: Algorithm 2: Variables — Write and Read
item.description: Explore how variables store and retrieve data within algorithms.

item.title: Algorithm 3: Conditional Operations
item.description: Learn how if/else statements and conditionals direct the flow of an algorithm.

item.title: Algorithm 4: Loops
item.description: Master loops to repeat actions efficiently in your algorithms.

item.title: Algorithm 5: Arrays and Lists
item.description: Discover how arrays and lists organize and manage collections of data.

item.title: Algorithm 6: Functions and Procedures
item.description: Learn how functions and procedures break complex problems into reusable blocks.

item.title: Algorithm 7: Recursion
item.description: Understand recursion and how functions can call themselves to solve problems.

item.title: Algorithm 8: Sorting Algorithms
item.description: Compare popular sorting algorithms like bubble sort, merge sort, and quicksort.

item.title: Algorithm 9: Searching Algorithms
item.description: Explore searching techniques including linear search and binary search.

item.title: Algorithm 10: Time and Space Complexity (Big O)
item.description: Learn how Big O notation measures algorithm efficiency and performance.

item.title: Flowcharts: Visualizing Logic
item.description: Use flowcharts to map out algorithm steps and visualize decision logic.

item.title: Debugging: How to Find and Fix Bugs
item.description: Learn systematic techniques to identify, trace, and fix bugs in your code.

item.title: HTML: Your First Web Page from Scratch
item.description: Build your very first HTML web page from the ground up with clean structure.

item.title: HTML 2: Forms, Inputs, and User Interaction
item.description: Create interactive forms to collect user data with various input types.

item.title: HTML 3: Semantic HTML and Accessibility
item.description: Write meaningful HTML with semantic tags to improve accessibility and SEO.

item.title: CSS: Styling Your First Website
item.description: Apply your first CSS styles to bring color, layout, and personality to your site.

item.title: CSS 2: Flexbox — The Complete Guide
item.description: Master Flexbox layout to align and distribute space among items in a container.

item.title: CSS 3: CSS Grid Layout for Modern Pages
item.description: Build complex two-dimensional layouts with CSS Grid for modern web pages.

item.title: CSS 4: Responsive Design with Media Queries
item.description: Make your website adapt to any screen size using CSS media queries.

item.title: CSS 5: Animations and Transitions
item.description: Add smooth animations and transitions to enhance user experience.

item.title: CSS 6: CSS Variables and Custom Properties
item.description: Use CSS variables to create maintainable, reusable, and themeable styles.

item.title: JavaScript: Adding Interactivity to Your Site
item.description: Make your static pages interactive with basic JavaScript event handling.

item.title: JavaScript 2: DOM Manipulation
item.description: Learn to select, create, and modify DOM elements to build dynamic pages.

item.title: JavaScript 3: Events and Event Handling
item.description: Handle user interactions with event listeners, bubbling, and delegation.

item.title: JavaScript 4: Fetch API and Async Programming
item.description: Fetch data from APIs and understand async/await for non-blocking operations.

item.title: JavaScript 5: ES6+ Features You Need to Know
item.description: Explore modern JavaScript features including arrow functions, destructuring, and modules.

item.title: JavaScript 6: JSON — Data Exchange Format
item.description: Learn JSON syntax and how to parse and stringify data in JavaScript.

item.title: Git: Version Control for Beginners
item.description: Start tracking changes in your code with Git's essential commands.

item.title: Git 2: Branching, Merging, and Collaboration
item.description: Use branches to work on features in parallel and merge changes safely.

item.title: GitHub: Hosting Your First Repository
item.description: Create a GitHub repository and push your project to the cloud.

item.title: VS Code: Essential Extensions and Shortcuts
item.description: Boost your productivity with must-have extensions and keyboard shortcuts in VS Code.

item.title: Terminal/Command Line: Basic Commands Every Developer Should Know
item.description: Master essential terminal commands for navigating files, directories, and system tasks.

item.title: How the Internet Works: From Browser to Server
item.description: Understand the journey of data from your browser through networks to web servers.

item.title: Python: Getting Started
item.description: Install Python and write your first program in this beginner-friendly guide.

item.title: Python 2: Data Types and Variables
item.description: Learn about Python's core data types and how to use variables effectively.

item.title: Python 3: Control Flow and Loops
item.description: Use conditionals and loops to control program execution in Python.

item.title: Python 4: Functions and Modules
item.description: Write reusable functions and organize code with Python modules.

item.title: Python 5: File Handling
item.description: Read from and write to files using Python's built-in file handling capabilities.

item.title: Python 6: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
item.description: Understand classes, objects, inheritance, and encapsulation in Python.

item.title: Python 7: Working with Libraries
item.description: Install and use third-party libraries with pip to extend Python's functionality.

item.title: Java: Introduction and Setup
item.description: Get started with Java by installing the JDK and writing your first program.

item.title: Java 2: OOP in Java — Classes and Objects
item.description: Build object-oriented programs with classes, objects, and methods in Java.

item.title: Java 3: Collections Framework
item.description: Use Java's Collections framework to store and manipulate groups of objects.

item.title: C Language: Basics and Setup
item.description: Set up your C development environment and learn the language fundamentals.

item.title: C 2: Pointers and Memory Management
item.description: Understand pointers, memory addresses, and dynamic allocation in C.

item.title: C 3: Structures and File I/O
item.description: Use structures to group data and perform file operations in C.

item.title: PHP: Server-Side Scripting Basics
item.description: Learn the basics of PHP for building dynamic server-side web applications.

item.title: PHP 2: Working with MySQL
item.description: Connect PHP to a MySQL database and perform CRUD operations.

item.title: SQL: Database Queries for Beginners
item.description: Write your first SQL queries to retrieve, filter, and sort data from a database.

item.title: SQL 2: JOINs, Subqueries, and Indexes
item.description: Combine tables with JOINs and optimize queries with subqueries and indexes.

item.title: SQL 3: Database Design and Normalization
item.description: Design efficient databases using normalization principles to reduce redundancy.

item.title: MS Excel: Starting a New Sheet
item.description: Create and set up a new Excel spreadsheet for organizing your data.

item.title: MS Excel 2: Formulas and Functions
item.description: Use essential Excel formulas and functions to automate calculations.

item.title: MS Excel 3: Charts and Data Visualization
item.description: Create charts and graphs to visualize your data in Excel.

item.title: MS Excel 4: Pivot Tables
item.description: Summarize and analyze large datasets with powerful pivot tables.

item.title: MS Excel 5: Advanced Functions
item.description: Master VLOOKUP, INDEX-MATCH, and other advanced Excel functions.

item.title: MS Word: Formatting and Templates
item.description: Format documents professionally and use templates to save time in Word.

item.title: MS PowerPoint: Creating Presentations
item.description: Design engaging slide decks with animations, layouts, and visual elements.

item.title: Google Sheets: Collaboration and Basics
item.description: Get started with Google Sheets and collaborate in real time with others.

item.title: Notion: Organizing Your Workflow
item.description: Use Notion to organize projects, notes, and tasks in one workspace.

item.title: Figma: UI/UX Design Basics
item.description: Learn the fundamentals of UI/UX design using Figma's powerful tools.

item.title: Docker: Containerization for Beginners
item.description: Package and run applications in isolated containers with Docker.

item.title: Linux: Essential Commands
item.description: Navigate the Linux terminal with essential commands for file and system management.

item.title: Linux 2: Shell Scripting Basics
item.description: Write shell scripts to automate tasks and streamline your Linux workflow.

item.title: What is a Computer? Hardware vs Software
item.description: Understand the difference between computer hardware and software components.

item.title: Operating Systems: How They Work
item.description: Learn how operating systems manage hardware resources and run programs.

item.title: Computer Networks: The Basics (IP, DNS, HTTP)
item.description: Explore fundamental networking concepts including IP addresses, DNS, and HTTP protocols.

item.title: Computer Networks 2: OSI Model Explained
item.description: Break down the OSI model's seven layers and understand how data travels across networks.

item.title: Data Structures: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues
item.description: Understand the most fundamental data structures and when to use each one.

item.title: Data Structures 2: Trees and Graphs
item.description: Explore hierarchical and connected data structures like trees and graphs.

item.title: Object-Oriented Programming: The Four Pillars
item.description: Master encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, and polymorphism in OOP.

item.title: Design Patterns Every Developer Should Know
item.description: Learn essential design patterns that solve common software architecture problems.

item.title: Binary and Number Systems Explained
item.description: Understand binary, octal, hexadecimal, and how computers represent numbers.

item.title: Boolean Logic and Logic Gates
item.description: Learn how AND, OR, NOT gates form the foundation of digital circuits.

item.title: Compilers vs Interpreters: What's the Difference
item.description: Compare how compilers and interpreters translate and execute code.

item.title: Cybersecurity Basics: Protecting Your Data
item.description: Learn the essential practices to keep your data safe from cyber threats.

item.title: Passwords and Authentication: Best Practices
item.description: Create strong passwords and enable multi-factor authentication for better security.

item.title: Network Security: Firewalls and Encryption
item.description: Protect your network with firewalls and understand how encryption keeps data safe.

item.title: Common Web Vulnerabilities (XSS, SQL Injection)
item.description: Identify and understand the most common web security vulnerabilities and how to prevent them.

item.title: Ethical Hacking: An Introduction
item.description: Discover the principles and practices of ethical hacking and penetration testing.

item.title: Kali Linux: Getting Started with Security Tools
item.description: Set up Kali Linux and explore its powerful suite of security testing tools.

item.title: Privacy on the Internet: What You Should Know
item.description: Understand online privacy risks and learn how to protect your personal information.

item.title: How to Write a Lesson Plan: Step by Step
item.description: Follow a structured approach to create effective lesson plans for any subject.

item.title: Classroom Management Strategies That Work
item.description: Implement proven strategies to maintain a productive and respectful learning environment.

item.title: Differentiated Teaching: Reaching Every Student
item.description: Adapt your teaching methods to meet the diverse needs of all learners.

item.title: Using ICT in Education: Practical Tips
item.description: Integrate technology effectively into your teaching with practical ICT strategies.

item.title: Formative Assessment: Tools and Techniques
item.description: Use formative assessments to monitor student progress and guide instruction.

item.title: Bloom's Taxonomy Applied to Computer Science
item.description: Apply Bloom's Taxonomy levels to design CS curricula that develop critical thinking.

item.title: Teaching Programming to Beginners: Common Mistakes
item.description: Avoid pitfalls when teaching programming and help beginners build confidence.

item.title: Gamification in the Classroom
item.description: Use game elements to boost engagement and motivation in educational settings.

item.title: Student Motivation: What Works and What Doesn't
item.description: Understand the science behind student motivation and apply effective strategies.

item.title: Reflective Teaching: Improving Through Self-Evaluation
item.description: Develop reflective practices to continuously improve your teaching effectiveness.

item.title: Problem-Solving Techniques for Developers
item.description: Sharpen your problem-solving skills with structured approaches and mental models.

item.title: How to Learn Programming Effectively
item.description: Discover proven strategies and habits to accelerate your programming learning journey.
